origin: CONTEXT:
- ECDC used hypothetical scenarios of 10-100 travellers for EU/EEA over 11-25 June 2026
- Actual travel volume from outbreak region (Ituri + North Kivu) to any destination is unknown
- ECDC: "100 travellers is a conservative upper estimate based on available historical flight data
and the closure of multiple airports in the proximity of the outbreak region"
- Tuite et al. 2019 (PMID 31414699): outbreak region airports (Beni/Bunia/Goma) had only ~30
outbound passengers over 4 months in 2018; 72.4% stayed within DRC
- No direct flights DRC/Uganda to any ASEAN country (MOH Malaysia confirmed)
- All routes transit via DXB
- PLAN v2 override: use hypothetical scenarios
- The per-traveller importation probability from ECDC model is destination-independent
(ECDC: "the underlying per-traveller probabilities are independent of the destination")
- Therefore the same traveller count N applied to ASEAN gives the same per-traveller risk
as EU/EEA; only the total traveller scenario differs
